obituary_text: It is always difficult saying goodbye to someone we love and cherish. Family and friends must say goodbye to their beloved Gloria J. Wynn of Hoover, Alabama, who passed away, on March 4, 2026. In the sacred silence of farewell, Gloria is released into the embrace of eternity, knowing that her light will continue to shine brightly in the tapestry of the lives of her loved ones. And as her memory is carried forward, may comfort be found in the knowledge that love is eternal, and that Gloria's spirit lives on in the beauty that surrounds us. Viewing will be held on Friday, March 13th 2026 from 1:00 PM to 5:00 PM. A funeral service will be held on Saturday, March 14th 2026 at 12:00 PM at the Faith Apostolic Church (2001 - Heron Johnson Dr. 35211).

With solemn hearts, we announce the passing of Rosie B. Lyles (Birmingham, Alabama), whose presence will be deeply missed, having departed on March 4, 2026. In the quiet moments of reflection, amidst the gentle rustle of leaves and the whispered song of the stars, we shall carry Rosie's memory with us, a guiding light illuminating the path ahead. May Rosie's journey be filled with peace and serenity, and may she find rest in the embrace of eternity. Viewing will be held on Friday, March 13th 2026 from 1:00 PM to 5:00 PM. A funeral service will be held on Saturday, March 14th 2026 at 11:00 AM at the Mt. Hebron Baptist Church (1620 24th Ave N, Birmingham, AL 35204).

With profound sadness, we say goodbye to Debrah Hernandez Garcia of Oak Harbor, Washington, born in West Covina, California, whose vibrant spirit touched the lives of many. Debrah left this world on February 23, 2026 at the age of 69, leaving a void in the lives of so many people. She was loved and cherished by many people including: her spouse Thomas George Garcia Sr.; her children, Thomas George Garcia Jr., Jennifer Ann Castillo and Jamie Laura Kessinger; her grandchildren, Destiny Marie Valvo, Brooklynn Savannah James, Vincent Michael Weiland, Kane William Parker, Brandon Bryant Castillo, Brody Bryant Castillo, Braydon Bryant Castillo, Brynn Bryant Castillo, Thomas George Garcia III and Jade Garcia of Georgia; and her great grandchildren, Hera Marie Valvo and Rhea Marie Valvo.

It is with great sadness that we announce the death of Alan T. Way of Milford, New Hampshire, who passed away on February 27, 2026, at the age of 69, leaving to mourn family and friends. He was loved and cherished by many people including: his parents, Edgar Way and Doris Way (Boudreau); his children, Alan (Jennifer Way), Christopher (Erika Way), Michael (Tiana Way) and Breanna Way of Milford; his grandchildren, Lily, Baylor, Eliette, Charlotte, Brody and Emersyn; and his siblings, Sue Abaid of Merrimack and David Way of Snellville. A celebration of life will be held on Sunday, April 19th 2026 from 2:00 PM to 5:00 PM at the Brick House (241 Union Square, Milford, NH 03055).

It is with deep sorrow that we announce the death of Rudolph V. Martinez of Cottage Grove, Minnesota, who passed away on March 9, 2026, at the age of 99, leaving to mourn family and friends. He was predeceased by: his parents, Esperison Martinez and Reyes Martinez; his wife Frances; and his sons, Dan and Billy. He is survived by: his children, Rudy (Laura), Jenny Severtson (Gene), Michelle (Gabriel) and Ric (Bonnie); his grandchildren, Jason, Ben, Stephanie, Missy, Gene, Mike, Vincent "Tony", Rico, Brittany, Antonio, Micaela and Emily; and his brother Danny Rivera. He is also survived by many great-grandchildren and great-great-grandchildren. Visitation will be held on Wednesday, April 8th 2026 from 10:00 AM to 11:00 AM at the Kok Funeral Home (7676 80th St S, Cottage Grove, MN 55016). A memorial service will be held on Wednesday, April 8th 2026 at 11:00 AM at the same location. A graveside service will be held on Wednesday, April 8th 2026 from 2:00 PM to 2:15 PM at the Ft. Snelling National Cemetery (7601 34th Ave S, Minneapolis, MN 55450).

We are sad to announce that on March 6, 2026, at the age of 72, Kevin Richard Birt of Shenandoah, Virginia, born in Montague, Prince Edward Island passed away. He was predeceased by: his parents, Richard Birt and Reta Birt; and his siblings, Stewart Birt and Faith Birt Rodgers. He is survived by: his wife Phyllis Birt; his children, Derryck Birt (Robin), Jennifer Wood (Joseph) and Laurel Sousa (Chris); and his grandchildren, Camryn, Savannah, Meegan, Easton, Lincoln, Georgia and Nora. A funeral service will be held on Saturday, March 14th 2026 at 11:00 AM at the Eackles-Spencer & Norton Funeral Home (256 Halltown Rd, Harpers Ferry, WV 25425). Memorial contributions may be made to Harvest Pointe Community Church http://hpcc.com .

We are sad to announce that on March 9, 2026 we had to say goodbye to April Kaylor of Girard, Illinois. In the vast expanse of eternity, April shall find rest, cradled in the arms of everlasting peace. And as we bid April farewell, her loved ones carry with them the precious gift of her memory, a beacon of hope guiding them through the shadows of sorrow towards the light of a new dawn. She was predeceased by: her brother-in-law Bo Kaylor; her mother-in-law Janice Kaylor; and her nephew Kai Lundstrom. She is survived by: her parent Deborah Chaudoin Lundstrom; her siblings, Tony Lundstrom, Amy Burch (Kory), Micah Turner, Stephanie Turner, Logan Turner (Kirstie) and Cody Turner; her stepfather James Turner; and her pets, Roze and Midnight. She is also survived by several nieces, nephews, great nieces and nephews.

With heavy hearts, we announce the death of Justin D. Jenkins of Pentress, West Virginia, who passed away on March 6, 2026 at the age of 40. As Justin departs from our midst, his spirit ascends to join the cosmic dance of stars, a shimmering constellation of memories that will forever grace the night sky of the hearts of those who loved Justin. Though Justin may no longer walk beside us, his legacy lives on — a testament to the enduring power of love to transcend the boundaries of time and space. He was predeceased by: his father David Jenkins. He is survived by: his mother Connie McCrobie-Gibson Jenkins; his children, Gunnar Jenkins and Angel Foley; and his sister Christina Jenkins.

The passing of Luella Leona Nickelson of Indianola, Iowa leaves a void in the hearts of many, as we bid farewell to a loving soul who departed on March 10, 2026 at the age of 94. She was predeceased by: her parents, Clem Hoch and Agnes Hoch (Schneider); her husband Dwight D. Nickelson; her daughter-in-law Joanie D. Nickelson (Bartlett); and her siblings, Walter Hoch, Clemmie Hoch, Marvin Hoch, Kenneth Hoch, Dean Hoch, Julia Snyder, Lillian Thill and Evelyn Rodgers. She is survived by: her children, Richard Nickelson (Renee), Roger Nickelson and Rebecca Hall (Rick); her grandchildren, Chad Nickelson (Rachel), Bryan Nickelson (Tiffany), Bryce Nickelson, Blake Nickelson, Joel Nickelson (Kate), Juliet Tobin (Tim), Janelle Freshour (Brad), Kara Yacavona (Joe) and Kelley Hall; her great grandchildren, Trenton Nickelson, Emmalee Weeks, Sydney Nickelson, Mason Nickelson, Savannah Nickelson, Weston McCoy, Paige Tobin, Benjamin Nickelson, William Nickelson, Abigail Nickelson, TJ Tobin, Piper Tobin, Zealand Freshour, Rockwell Freshour, Nathan Warren, Jacob Warren, Joseph Yacavona and Luke Yacavona; and her siblings, Gene Hoch, Carolyn Wallace and Marilyn Orey. Memorials in memory of Luella may be given to St. Joseph Renovation Fund.

The memory of Roger S. Larson (Binghamton, New York), who passed away on March 7, 2026 at the age of 64, will forever remain in the hearts of those touched by this precious presence in their lives. In the quiet moments of reflection, let us honor Roger's memory by embracing the beauty of each fleeting moment, knowing that his spirit resides in the eternal tapestry of existence, forever woven into the fabric of our hearts. He was predeceased by: his father Roger A. Larson; and his wife Tracy L. Larson (Wells). He is survived by: his mother Bonnee L. Shaffer; his son Brent A. Berner (Samantha G. Jones); his grandchildren, Ethan Berner, Carson Berner and Trenten Berner; and his siblings, Shawn K. Larson (Kristin L. Edwards), Greg L. Shaffer (Maggie Kamens) and Lori J. Penman (Scott R. Penman). He is also survived by several aunts, uncles, cousins, nieces, and nephews.

With solemn reverence, we commemorate Barbara Ann Kemper of Bidwell, Ohio, whose life came to an end on March 8, 2026 at the age of 78, leaving behind cherished memories. She was predeceased by: her parents, Robert Kiser and Rita Kiser (Bouzan); the father of her children William L. "Junior" Kemper; and her brother William "Bill" Kiser. She is survived by: her children, Matthew Kemper (Vicki), Georgia, Michael Kemper (Monica) and Manny Kemper (Kimberly); her grandchildren, Nick Kemper (Carly), Katie Rospond (Ryan), Max Kemper (Ashlyn), Mike Kemper (Alex), Hannah Kemper, Ethan Kemper and Danielle Paige Kemper; her great grandchildren, Eli, Sony, Avery and Lucy Kemper; her sisters, Joan Eggleton, Roberta Shriver, Karen Gilliand and Pam Stover; and her sister-in-law Caryl Kiser. She is also survived by many nieces, nephews.

We bid farewell to Mariano Padilla of Albuquerque, New Mexico, whose journey of life gracefully concluded on March 9, 2026 at the age of 75. Mariano touched countless lives with warmth and kindness, leaving behind cherished memories that will forever echo in hearts. He was predeceased by: his siblings, Roy Padilla and Inez Aguilar; and his father Carmel Padilla. He is survived by: his children, Mariano Padilla, Jr. and Melissa Padilla; his siblings, Carmelito, Gloria, Theresa, Annette and Jane; the mother of his children Angie Padilla; and his mother Lina Padilla. He is also survived by seven grandchildren and four great-great grandchildren. Visitation will be held on Friday, March 13th 2026 from 7:00 PM to 7:30 PM at the Catholic Church of Ascension (2150 Raymac Rd SW, Albuquerque, NM 87105). A rosary will be held on Friday, March 13th 2026 from 7:30 PM to 8:00 PM at the same location. A Mass will be held on Saturday, March 14th 2026 from 10:00 AM to 11:00 AM at the Catholic Church of the Ascension (2150 Raymac Rd SW, Albuquerque, NM 87105). A burial will be held on Saturday, March 14th 2026 from 11:30 AM to 12:00 PM at the Los Padillas Cemetery (2117 Los Padillas Rd SW, Albuquerque, NM 87105).
